## Related

- Implements issue / RFC / ADR: #
- Spec section(s) affected (if any):

## Definition of Done (see ENGINEERING.md §4)

- [ ] Implements a documented spec section or accepted ADR/RFC (no undocumented behaviour)
- [ ] Tests added/updated; coverage gates met; settlement‑critical paths have Daml Script tests
- [ ] Lint, format, typecheck, unit + property tests, Daml tests, conformance suite pass
- [ ] Public API documented (TSDoc); `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] No secrets; no PII/intent/route in logs; no new unvetted dependency
- [ ] Open/closed boundary preserved; neutrality respected (GOVERNANCE.md §3)
- [ ] Backward compatibility considered; breaking changes flagged + versioned

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Trade-offs, risks, anything out of scope -->

> Conventional Commit title required. Sign off your commits (`git commit -s`). Do not push to `main`.
